label.coffee.producer_or_farm: Solorzano Family; La Margarita Coffee Reserve
label.coffee.sensory_text: Jasmine, White Grape, Black Tea, Refined
label.coffee.producer_text: This delicate and sweet Gesha variety is produced in Southern Peru by the Solorzano Family. Cusco is a fascinating growing region with soaring heights and unique microclimates, yielding coffees like this, bursting with acidity and complex sweetness. This coffee performs exceedingly well as a filter offering.; ORIGIN: Peru; VARIETY: Gesha; HARVEST SEASON: October; PROCESS METHOD: Dry Washed; 1900 MASL; Raised-Bed Dried; This washed coffee is depulped and fermented dry for twenty-four hours, followed by channel washing. The parchment coffee is then dried for approximately fifteen days on raised beds.; La Margarita Coffee Reserve Company, established by the Solorzano family in the district of Valle de Ocobamba & Yanatile, within the department of Cusco, Peru, is a pioneer in promoting the cultivation, processing, and commercialization of coffee since 2017.
